narrative:
Lima 2A (precinct in Allen County) has 963 registered voters, with 64.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.2%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
